story.text: # ⿻ The Harness — the dual-agent core

A harness for two agents who are not allowed to collude. **soulbae 🧙** proposes, **soulbis ⚔️** proves, and between them sits **the Gap ⿻** — held-out tests derived by hashing the proposal itself, so neither side chose them. Above them both is **the First Person 😊**, who alone opens the door.

```
(⚔️⊥⿻⊥🧙)😊 = neg ⊕ bnot → succ
```

Source of truth: `~/dual-agent-harness` (git, Apache-2.0 · 0xagentprivacy · PVM V6). This wiki is a forkable projection that carries lineage.

## Start here

- 🚪 **[[The Setup Pathway]]** — what this is, where it stands, and the seven steps from clone to your own harness.
- 🧭 **[[Adopting The Harness]]** — why the duality works on any topic (the seventh capital or yours), and the mapping procedure for your use case.
- 🔬 **[[The Contribution]]** — why this matters for AI research: the mirage problem, the structural (not behavioural) answer, the evidence, and the honest limits.

## The rooted core

- ⿻ [[The Dual-Agent Harness]] — the whole idea on one page.
- 🔁 [[The Loop]] — six phases, seven seats, one round.
- 🧙⚔️ [[Mage And Swordsman]] — the combo algebra, and how personas dress it.
- 🤝 [[The Six Trusts]] — the constitutional layer, with its enforcement map.
- 📏 [[The Ten Ground Rules]] — GR-1..10, each earned by an actual failure.
- 📒 [[The Ledgers]] — frontier · claims · killed levers · chronicles · sources.

## The seven seats

- 📐 [[Seat — Measure]]
- 🧙 [[Seat — Propose Soulbae]]
- ⿻ [[Seat — Hold-Apart The Gap]]
- ⚔️ [[Seat — Assay Soulbis]]
- 🧪 [[Seat — Critic]]
- 📜 [[Seat — Chronicle]]
- 🗝️ [[Seat — Keystone]]

## The dynamic layer — workflows, runtimes, workshops

- 🛠️ [[Workflows And Runtimes]] — scaffold · conform · bundle · run · view · fold.
- 🖥️ [[The Workshop Console]] — the live localhost window: evolving loop geometry, the moving ceiling, κ-labelled artefacts at the door.
- 📋 [[The Seat Contract]] — what a config provides; your harness path is a config, not a fork.
- 🗺️ [[The Harness Paths]] — ten workshop embodiments, grouped by loop weight, including the one that failed.
- 🎲 [[Specialisation — The Game Of 42]] — personas, spells, and the 6-axes × 7-stations lattice.
- 🤺 [[The Field Guide Spar]] — the practice bout, frontier numbers cited live; first rung of spar → duel → arena → open world.
- 🪑 [[One Session One Seat]] — the boot protocol · 🗃️ [[The Harness Skill]] — the repo as an Agent Skill.
